mnemonics.title: SDLC Phases
mnemonics.content: Real Developers Implement Tests Daily: Requirements, Design, Implementation, Testing, Deployment

mnemonics.title: V-Model Stages
mnemonics.content: Every Hero Deserves Victory: Requirements (Validation) ↔ Acceptance Testing, Design (Verification) ↔ System Testing

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a multi-level waterfall flowing down through phases without upward movement
Picture concentric circles expanding outward with each sprint adding features

analogies.analogy: Like constructing a building: Blueprint (Design) → Construction (Implementation) → Inspection (Testing) → Occupancy (Deployment)
Similar to re-checking all chapters after editing a book page
